PERIODS OF WEATHER EXCEEDING THE ABOVE DESCRIBED GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS ARE TO BE EXPRESSELY EXCLUDED FROM THE EVALUATION OF VESSELS PERFORMANCE. NO EXTRAPOLATIONS TO BE MADE, FOR THE PURPOSES OF CALCULATING CHARTERERS’ LOSSES RESULTING FROM ANY UNDERPERFORMANCE, OVER ANY PERIODS DURING WHICH THE WEATHER/SEA CONDITIONS ARE OTHER THAN AS THOSE DESCRIBED ABOVE.
